title: FeasibilitySignal
description: A go/no-go/refine verdict on whether an Intent is ready to implement (agency/capabilities/discover/ontology.py; Spec 153 Slice 6 — discover-prompt wave). Links to DiscoverySession; the verdict gates the clarify→build transition.

verdict.description: Feasibility decision: go (ready), no-go (blocked), or refine (needs more discovery).

rationale.description: Human-readable explanation of the verdict — what was assessed and why.
